hero.title: AI system for managing client communications
hero.subtitle: Netpeak Aura automatically analyzes client communications and detects tactical and strategic risks in service operations.

problem.title: Why service companies lose control over client communications
problem.subtitle: As your business grows, communication chaos becomes unmanageable without automation.

solution.title: How Netpeak Aura works
solution.subtitle: AI transforms the message flow into a project risk map.

steps.title: Connect channels
steps.desc: Aura integrates with Telegram, Slack, Email and other communication channels.

steps.title: Analyze communications
steps.desc: AI analyzes sentiment, response time and commitment tracking.

steps.title: Detect risks
steps.desc: The system automatically identifies tactical and strategic risks.

steps.title: Insights for managers
steps.desc: You get a dashboard with a health map of all your projects.

risks.title: Two types of risks under control

features.title: Platform capabilities
features.subtitle: 7 modules for full control of service communications.

list.title: Risk Management
list.desc: Project Health Score, sentiment trend analysis, predictive churn model and risk playbook.

list.title: PM Copilot
list.desc: AI manager assistant: weekly digest, smart reminders and communication recommendations.

list.title: Analytics & Insights
list.desc: Project health dashboard, Communication Score PM and client pattern analytics.

list.title: Learning & Development
list.desc: Client Communication Profile, work style recommendations and best practices library.

list.title: Onboarding
list.desc: Monitoring first 30 days of a project, onboarding checklist and client profile.

list.title: Revenue Growth
list.desc: Cross-sell detection and opportunity report for identifying growth opportunities.

list.title: Automation
list.desc: Automatic NPS surveys, payment reminders and onboarding messages.

dashboard.title: Aura Dashboard Example
dashboard.subtitle: This is what your project health map looks like in real time.

forwho.title: Who is Aura for
forwho.subtitle: Built for leaders of service businesses who need visibility into the quality of client communications.
forwho.quote: "Aura is for those who run a service business and want to see problems before the client does."

nps.title: Automatic NPS surveys directly in chats
nps.subtitle: Aura sends NPS surveys to clients, collects responses and links them to communications.
items: Automatic sending at the right moment

roadmap.title: Product Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Upcoming releases that will expand Aura's capabilities.

items.title: PM Digests
items.desc: AI summaries for managers: at-risk clients, sentiment drops, overdue responses.

items.title: Video Call Analysis
items.desc: Transcription and sentiment analysis of Zoom, Google Meet and Teams calls.

items.title: AI Recommendations for PM
items.desc: Aura will suggest how to respond to clients and how to resolve conflicts.

items.title: Full Communication Context
items.desc: Unifying chats, email and calls into a single client profile.

case.title: Aura already works at Netpeak
case.subtitle: An internal tool that has proven its effectiveness.
